membership_no.text: ทะเบียนผู้กู้

as_name.default: นางชุติมา พุ่มบุบผา

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.coop_position, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_position_long(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as position_long, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.member_group_no) as member_group_name, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount)::double precision) as thai_money_amount, '!as_name_1!' as ass_name, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.period, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_description, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no) as coll_group_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no) as coll_mem_name, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount)::double precision) as thai_loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount)::double precision) as thai_period_payment_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month)::int,'LT') as receive_month_thai, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as tdate_due, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_rep_kep_return_month.book_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as book_date_tdate, (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive, sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det, sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_contract_coll , sc_rep_kep_return_month
WHERE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month AND sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = trim( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_description ) AND sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no AND sc_rep_kep_return_month.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no AND sc_rep_kep_return_month.count_month = 1 AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receipt_status = '2' AND sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0'
AND sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no not in ( select sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment where sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code = '01' and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result = '1' )
-- AND sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no in ( select tab_coll.ref_own_no -- from sc_lon_m_contract_coll tab_coll -- where tab_coll.ref_own_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no -- and tab_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and sc_rep_kep_return_month.rep_type = 'BOK'
/*WHERE*/ -- and ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = 2020 ) -- and ( sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month = 6 ) -- and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '072838') order by sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no
